briefing.title: Executive briefing
briefing.summaryNormal: Clinic operating normally today. No urgent operational issues detected.
briefing.disclaimer: Suggestions only — no diagnosis; you confirm every action.
briefing.item_called_not_seen: {count} patient(s) called but not yet seen

copilot.title: Clinic Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Read-only assistant
copilot.disclaimer: Drafts only — no diagnoses; you confirm all actions.
copilot.empty: Pick a suggestion or ask about data you can access.

copilot.draftsSubtitle: Generate a draft to review and edit
copilot.draftReviewNote: Review and edit before entering into the record. Nothing is saved automatically.

login.title: Welcome!
login.subtitle: Manage your patients, appointments and consultations securely.
login.trustBadge: Secure. Reliable. Built for clinics in Senegal.
login.trustTagline: Manage your patients, appointments and consultations securely.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
login.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.errorTimeout: Connection timed out (15 s). Check your network and try again.
login.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

changePassword.errorGeneric: Error changing password. Please try again.
changePassword.zodLower: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
changePassword.zodUpper: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
changePassword.zodDigit: Must contain at least one digit
changePassword.zodSpecial: Must contain at least one special character

patients.title: Patients
patients.subtitle: Manage your clinic's patient records
patients.errorDesc: An error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
patients.emptyDesc: Create your first patient record to get started.
patients.deleteConfirm: You are about to permanently delete {name}. This action is irreversible.

patients.zodCniDuplicate: This CNI is already registered for another patient
patients.offlineDemographicsNote: Saved offline. Insurance and consent require a connection.
patients.smsOptInHint: The patient agrees to receive appointment reminders by SMS.
patients.softDeleteNote: Deletion is reversible: records are hidden, not erased. An admin can restore them.
patients.consentHint: The patient consented to the recording and processing of their medical data.

appointments.title: Appointments & Queue

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.subtitle: Statistics for the last 12 months

settings.title: Settings
settings.nineaHint: National business identification number — shown on invoices
settings.rcHint: Clinic RCCM number — shown on invoices
settings.smsRemindersHint: Automatically send reminders to patients who opted in to SMS.
settings.smsSenderHint: Short name shown as the sender (max 11 chars), if supported by the carrier.
settings.exportDesc: Export your clinic's data as CSV. Every export is logged.
settings.exportNote: Deleted records are excluded. Clinic admins only.

adminClinics.title: Clinic Management
adminClinics.subtitle: Super administrator view
adminClinics.archivedNotice: Archived clinics are hidden from the normal view. Historical data is preserved.
adminClinics.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.
adminClinics.archiveNote1: All users of this clinic will be deactivated
adminClinics.archiveNote3: The clinic will be hidden from the normal view but remains accessible in audit mode
adminClinics.archiveNote4: This action can be reversed via Supabase if necessary
adminClinics.tempPasswordWarning: This password will only be shown once. The admin must change it on first login.
adminClinics.adminNote: A temporary password will be generated. The admin must change it on first login.

adminRequests.title: Registration Requests
adminRequests.subtitle: Clinics awaiting approval
adminRequests.rejectConfirm: You are about to reject the request from {name}.
adminRequests.tempPasswordNote: Share with {email} via a secure channel (call, SMS, WhatsApp).
adminRequests.tempPasswordWarning: This password will no longer be shown after closing. The admin must change it on first login.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.tempPasswordNote: Share this password with {name} ({email}). The user must change it on next login.
adminUsers.tempPasswordWarning: This password will no longer be shown after closing.
adminUsers.methodInviteHint: Sends an invitation link. The user creates their account and sets their own password.
adminUsers.methodTempHint: Creates the account immediately with a temporary password to share. Must be changed at first login.
adminUsers.createdNote: Account created for {name} ({email}). Share this temporary password with them; they must change it at first login.
adminUsers.duty_admin: Manages the clinic, users, settings, reports and day-to-day operations.
adminUsers.duty_doctor: Runs consultations, prescribes medications, orders lab tests and follows up patients.
adminUsers.duty_receptionist: Registers patients, manages appointments, the waiting room and front desk.
adminUsers.duty_nurse: Records vitals, assists consultations, follows up care and prepares patients.
adminUsers.duty_cashier: Manages invoices, payments, receipts and outstanding balances.
adminUsers.duty_lab_technician: Processes lab requests, enters results and tracks samples.
adminUsers.duty_pharmacist: Manages pharmacy stock, dispensing, batches, expiries and substitutions.
adminUsers.previewHint: Select a role to see its duties and access.

workforce.title: Workforce
workforce.noEmploymentRecordHint: No HR record yet. Create one to manage employment, credentials and lifecycle.
workforce.sessionNote: Some security metrics will be instrumented later.
workforce.verificationNote: Verification is a manual action. It is never automated.

adminBilling.title: Payments
adminBilling.subtitle: Global payments view — all clinics
adminBilling.aggregateNotice: Aggregate view only: for privacy, patient names and invoice-level details are not accessible to the super admin.
adminBilling.pilotNotice: Wave and Orange Money payments are not yet active. The payment_status and provider_ref columns will be populated after activation.

onboarding.title: Initial Setup
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to get started
onboarding.skipLink: Skip setup and go to dashboard
onboarding.step1Desc: Complete the basic information about your establishment.
onboarding.step2Desc: List your services with their prices to simplify billing.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add doctors, nurses, and receptionists to your workspace.
onboarding.step4Desc: Everything is set up. You can start using CHMS.
onboarding.finishDesc: Profile, services, and team configured. You can now start registering patients and managing consultations.

workspace.emptyActions: No quick actions for this role
workspace.previewIntro: This reflects your dashboard’s current configuration (general practice). Read-only — personalization arrives in a future phase.
workspace.previewNote: Phase 14.2 preview — specialty and add-on pack composition is not active yet.

adminActivity.title: Platform Activity Center
adminActivity.subtitle: Operational visibility across every clinic — with no access to medical data
adminActivity.noAccessMessage: This page is reserved for the platform super administrator.
adminActivity.privacyNotice: Aggregate platform view only: no patient name, diagnosis, prescription, or lab result is ever shown here.
adminActivity.aggregateNoteSms: Aggregate totals only — no phone number or message content is accessible.
adminActivity.aggregateNoteAi: Interaction counts only — AI exchange content is never exposed here.
adminActivity.roadmapNote: Security Center (failed logins, lockouts), System Health (API, database, storage, deployment), and Online Users require new instrumentation and are not yet available — no data is simulated.

adminReliability.noAccessMessage: This page is reserved for the platform super administrator.
adminReliability.title: Platform Reliability
adminReliability.subtitle: Incidents, errors and operational health across clinics — with no medical data
adminReliability.privacyNotice: Operational monitoring only: error messages are sanitized and never expose medical content (names, diagnoses, prescriptions, results).
adminReliability.emptyIncidentsDesc: No operational anomalies in this range.
adminReliability.scopeNote: Errors are sanitized at write time (emails, phones, ids and long numbers masked) and no request payload is ever captured. Displayed ids are masked.

gpCopilot.title: GP Clinical Copilot
gpCopilot.subtitle: Read-only · operational · deterministic
gpCopilot.rem_bp_followup: Recorded blood pressure {systolic}/{diastolic} — routine follow-up reminder
gpCopilot.rem_glucose_followup: Recorded blood glucose {value} — routine follow-up reminder
gpCopilot.medSeeSafety: See the Medication Safety panel for details
gpCopilot.disclaimer: The physician makes all clinical decisions. This assistant only summarises, organises and reminds — it is read-only.

pedsCopilot.title: Pediatrics Clinical Copilot
pedsCopilot.subtitle: Read-only · operational · deterministic
pedsCopilot.growthPlaceholders: Head circumference and growth percentiles are not implemented yet — no values are estimated.
pedsCopilot.vaxPlaceholder: Schedule {version} — placeholder, verify against the local vaccination programme. Reminders, not medical orders.
pedsCopilot.medNoDosing: No dosing recommendations — dosing decisions remain with the clinician.
pedsCopilot.commNote: Templates for manual use — no automatic sending.
pedsCopilot.disclaimer: The pediatrician makes all clinical decisions. This assistant only summarises, organises and reminds — it is read-only.

obgynCopilot.labNoInterpret: Results and ultrasound reports are surfaced but not interpreted.
obgynCopilot.medPregnancyPlaceholder: Pregnancy-specific medication safety is not implemented (no validated ruleset) — no classification is shown.
obgynCopilot.disclaimer: The clinician makes all clinical decisions. This assistant only summarises, organises and reminds — it is read-only.
